resources.string: Welcome to XYZ Fitness Center! Your journey to fitness starts here. Please use the menu to explore our plans, meet our trainers, or view membership options.

XYZ Fitness Center has been providing top-notch fitness services since 2010. Our mission is to provide a supportive and motivating environment for individuals of all fitness levels. We are dedicated to your health and well-being with state-of-the-art equipment and certified professionals.

Contact us at:

Phone: +1 234 567 890
Email: contact@xyzfitness.com
Address: 123 Fitness St, Health City, HC 12345

Hours: Mon-Sun: 6:00 AM - 11:00 PM

Our Workout Programs:

1. Weight Loss: Focused on high-intensity interval training and nutrition.
2. Cardio: Improve your heart health and endurance.
3. Muscle Building: Strength training and hypertrophy programs.
4. Yoga & Flexibility: Balance your body and mind.
5. HIIT: Short, intense bursts of exercise.

Membership Packages:

• Basic: $20/month
 - Includes Gym access and Locker room use.

• Premium: $50/month
 - Includes Basic features + All Group Classes.

• VIP: $100/month
 - Includes Premium features + 2 Personal Trainer sessions per month.
